mapper.sql: select notice_id, notice_type, title, content, form_id, receive_user_id, receive_user_name, is_read, read_time, create_by, create_time from bc_notice
mapper.select: select count(*) from bc_notice where receive_user_id = #{userId} and is_read = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into bc_notice( notice_type, title, content, form_id, receive_user_id, receive_user_name, is_read, create_by, create_time )values( #{noticeType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{formId}, #{receiveUserId}, #{receiveUserName}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate() )

insert into bc_notice(notice_type, title, content, form_id, receive_user_id, receive_user_name, is_read, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.noticeType}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.formId}, #{item.receiveUserId}, #{item.receiveUserName}, '0', #{item.createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update bc_notice set is_read = '1', read_time = sysdate() where notice_id = #{noticeId}
update bc_notice set is_read = '1', read_time = sysdate() where receive_user_id = #{userId} and is_read = '0'
mapper.delete:
delete from bc_notice where notice_id in
#{noticeId}
